description: Sanitized Phase 2 connector fixture manifest. These files are for adapter and sync tests only; they are not live API responses.

matrix.expected_behavior: Creates raw metadata, normalized document, chunks, FTS rows, and sync state.
Updates document and replaces old chunks atomically.
Marks source archived/deleted and changes query ranking.
Ingests Jira issue independently without requiring PagerDuty relationship.
Preserves Slack thread timestamp, replies, and update metadata.
Stores audit metadata only; fixture contains only a redacted placeholder, not blocked content.
